name: Potatoes Mary Margaret
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and slice the potatoes very thin.
2. Layer the slices in a small buttered casserole dish.
3. Sprinkle salt and pepper over the potato layers.
4. Top with cheese.
5. In a saucepan, heat cream, butter, and garlic over low heat until the mixture reduces by half.
6. Pour the reduced cream mixture evenly over the potatoes.
7. Sprinkle paprika on top of the potatoes.
8. Bake in a 350 degree Fahrenheit oven for 1 1/2 hours.
Enjoy!
